initial_program:
asp
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Column groups
left_region(C) :- C = 0.
left_region(C) :- C = 1.
left_region(C) :- C = 2.

mid_region(C) :- C = 4.
mid_region(C) :- C = 5.
mid_region(C) :- C = 6.

right_region(C) :- C = 8.
right_region(C) :- C = 9.
right_region(C) :- C = 10.

central_region(C) :- C = 3.
central_region(C) :- C = 7.

% Rows that consist only of colour 5
row_is_all_five(R) :- #count{ C : input(R, C, Color), Color != 5 } = 0.

% Max colour (ignoring 0 and 5) for each group
max_left(VL)  :- VL = #max{ Color : input(R, C, Color), left_region(C), Color != 0, Color != 5 }.
max_mid(VM)   :- VM = #max{ Color : input(R, C, Color), mid_region(C),   Color != 0, Color != 5 }.
max_right(VR) :- VR = #max{ Color : input(R, C, Color), right_region(C), Color != 0, Color != 5 }.

% Group value (the maximal colour)
left_val(VL)  :- max_left(VL).
mid_val(VM)   :- max_mid(VM).
right_val(VR) :- max_right(VR).

% Normal rows (not allfive)  use group maxima + 5
output(R, C, Color) :- left_region(C), left_val(VL), Color = VL + 5, row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R).
output(R, C, Color) :- mid_region(C),  mid_val(VM), Color = VM + 5, row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R).
output(R, C, Color) :- right_region(C), right_val(VR), Color = VR + 5, row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R).
output(R, C, Color) :- central_region(C), row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R), Color = 5.

% Special rows  every cell is colour 5
output(R, C, Color) :- row_is_all_five(R), row(R), col(C), Color = 5.

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- row(R), col(C).

#show output/3.

n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

final_program:
asp
% Grid dimensions
n_rows(N) :- N = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(M) :- M = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.
row(0..N-1) :- n_rows(N).
col(0..M-1) :- n_cols(M).

% Column groups
left_region(C) :- C = 0.
left_region(C) :- C = 1.
left_region(C) :- C = 2.

mid_region(C) :- C = 4.
mid_region(C) :- C = 5.
mid_region(C) :- C = 6.

right_region(C) :- C = 8.
right_region(C) :- C = 9.
right_region(C) :- C = 10.

central_region(C) :- C = 3.
central_region(C) :- C = 7.

% Rows that consist only of colour 5
row_is_all_five(R) :- #count{ C : input(R, C, Color), Color != 5 } = 0.

% Max colour (ignoring 0 and 5) for each group
max_left(VL)  :- VL = #max{ Color : input(R, C, Color), left_region(C), Color != 0, Color != 5 }.
max_mid(VM)   :- VM = #max{ Color : input(R, C, Color), mid_region(C),   Color != 0, Color != 5 }.
max_right(VR) :- VR = #max{ Color : input(R, C, Color), right_region(C), Color != 0, Color != 5 }.

% Group value (the maximal colour)
left_val(VL)  :- max_left(VL).
mid_val(VM)   :- max_mid(VM).
right_val(VR) :- max_right(VR).

% Normal rows (not allfive)  use group maxima + 5
output(R, C, Color) :- left_region(C), left_val(VL), Color = VL + 5, row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R).
output(R, C, Color) :- mid_region(C),  mid_val(VM), Color = VM + 5, row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R).
output(R, C, Color) :- right_region(C), right_val(VR), Color = VR + 5, row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R).
output(R, C, Color) :- central_region(C), row(R), col(C), not row_is_all_five(R), Color = 5.

% Special rows  every cell is colour 5
output(R, C, Color) :- row_is_all_five(R), row(R), col(C), Color = 5.

% Exactly one output per cell
1 { output(R, C, Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- row(R), col(C).

#show output/3.
